projects.title: IntellectMesh
description: Developed a distributed Agentic AI system using FastAPI and MCP, enabling autonomous tools such as a scraper, critic, and LLM refiner to self-register, resolve each other dynamically, and collaborate through a structured A2A communication workflow.
Implemented remote agent orchestration using dynamic ngrok tunnels, allowing multi-machine integration of AI tools without requiring static IPs or manual network configuration.

projects.title: Mall Sphere
description: Designed and implemented ShopSpectra, a centralized Mall Management System for seven malls, enabling shop exploration and customer engagement with interactive dashboards.
Integrated a secure transaction repository and customer review system, ensuring transparency, security, and enhanced user engagement within the platform.

projects.title: BidMatch
description: Developed a tool to analyze RFPs, improving bid evaluation accuracy by 30%, matching user-defined conditions with company data, and presenting the top bids with detailed analysis.
Automated the comparison of bids, reducing processing time by 50% and highlighting the most relevant options based on both qualitative and quantitative criteria.

education.degree: B.Tech - Major: Electrical Engineering; Minor: AI and ML

description: Developed MCP compliant tools and orchestrators that enabled scalable LLM-to-tool communication, reducing manual query handling by 70%.
Built A2A pipelines with FastAPI improving agent execution speed and response accuracy
Automated multi-agent workflows with critic evaluation and LLM refinement, boosting overall system efficiency and output quality by a factor of 0.8
Developed innovative GenAI and ML solutions using advanced ML algorithms, LLMs, RAG pipelines, and Transformer models, boosting NLP query response accuracy by 60%.
Enhanced data processing efficiency through Neural Network architectures and Lang Chain.
Spearheaded the development of brAIn spark, reducing query resolution time by 40% while ensuring secure handling of sensitive client data.
